prompt: A dark, cinematic anime-horror key visual in a vertical poster composition, set at night inside or beside a shattered window with a huge glowing full moon dominating the background. In the center foreground, a young couple stands in an intimate embrace. The male figure is tall and slim, wearing a dark brown or charcoal hoodie with the hood up, white drawstrings, subtle red blood-like stains on the sleeve and lower hem, and dark red pants. His skin is pale, his long black hair falls over one eye, and the lower half of his face is wrapped in dirty white bandages stained with blood, giving him a disturbing but protective antihero presence. One hand and wrist are also wrapped in bandages. He looks slightly upward and away with a solemn, haunted expression while holding the girl around her back. The female figure is petite with extremely long straight platinum-blonde hair reaching past her waist, wearing a loose white coat or cardigan over a black-and-white outfit and a black choker. She faces him closely with both hands clasped together against his chest, creating a tender contrast against the horror atmosphere. Add 2 ghostly supporting figures in the background: on the left, a pale blonde girl in shadow wearing striped clothing and holding an object close to her chest; on the right, a hooded male figure in profile with glasses or sharp facial lines, his hood marked by a dark blood stain. The environment is filled with floating shards of broken glass, blue moonlight, dust motes, and star-like particles, with deep navy, black, and icy blue tones throughout. Place a stylized red Japanese title at the top right, 殺戮の天使, with a smaller red serif English subtitle beneath it reading Memory Collection. Make the overall style a polished live-action cosplay poster blended with anime horror cover art, highly detailed, dramatic rim lighting, glossy fabric textures, supernatural atmosphere, tragic romance mood, and a premium game or visual novel promotional aesthetic.
